title: Ryan Bible
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Ryan Bible
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
biography: Ryan Bible (Assistant Professor of Lighting and Sound) received his M.F.A. from the University of Florida and B.F.A. from CCM at the University of Cincinnati. Prior to CNU, Ryan taught lighting, sound, publicity, stage management, and playwriting at American Heritage School, a private K-12 school in South Florida.
education_entries: MFA in Theatre, University of Florida
BFA in Theatre Design and Production, University of Cincinnati

Grants and Sponsored Research: Andrew Falk, Christopher Kreider, Ryan Bible, "National Marine Sanctuary Foundation Grant," Sponsored by National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA)
